</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Enalapril (Maleate) 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of heart failure.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>congestive heart failure（99.3%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>acute pulmonary heart disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（98.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（98.8%）</li>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（98.8%）</li>
<li>hypertensive disorder（98.8%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（98.7%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（98.3%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>chronic kidney disease（97.9%）</li>
<li>end stage renal failure（96.9%）</li>
<li>intracerebral hemorrhage（96.1%）</li>
<li>chronic renal failure syndrome（95.5%）</li>
<li>cerebrovascular disorder（94.5%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant familial hematuria-retinal arteriolar tortuosity-contractures syndrome（94.1%）</li>
<li>brain small vessel disease 1 with or without ocular anomalies（93.8%）</li>
<li>heart failure（93.0%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（92.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
